name: PeriodicPeriodontalScreeningScore
title: PeriodicPeriodontalScreeningScore CodeSystem.
description: Codes for the periodontal screening for dental plaque-related diseases (Periodic Periodontal Screening, PPS).

concept.display: Pockets groter dan of gelijk aan 6 millimeter = wellicht niet in orde

text.div: No narrative is provided for definitional resources. A human-readable rendering can be found in the implementation guide(s) where this resource is used.
